name: The Monster Under Your Bed
description:
Something has been living under your bed since you were little. A monster that made odd sounds, ate your toys and scared off your pets. But of course your parents convinced you it was nothing. And after a while you convinced yourself it was nothing too.

But it ABSOLUTELY WAS SOMETHING. And it's followed you everywhere you've slept. Now it's gotten confident enough to make itself known.

Just a quick and sloppy bot I wanted to make. Who dosnt like a Protective Monster Mommy?

Also just to let you all know. I won't be leaving Janitor due to the new Guidelines everyone is throwing a fit about. It's honestly not a big deal. Cheers everyone!
creator: Mason8tor
